items.name_en: Overseas Top-tier Original M80091 Green Three-piece MULTI POCHETTE FÉLICIE
items.name_cn:
Overseas Top-tier Original M80091 Green Three-piece MULTI POCHETTE FÉLICIE
The main bag can fit the largest iPhone, with an inner compartment and three card slots. The small card bag can be detached and used separately in other bags or hung anywhere. Adjustable wide shoulder strap allows for shoulder, crossbody, and other carrying styles. Perfect combination of practicality and trendiness.
Dimensions: 17x9.6x3.5cm

items.name_en: Oversized logo 🚩🚩 French Coffee ☕️ Color. Very practical. OHANEL Vintage custom cowhide. The real thing is super retro and looks great, a favorite for autumn and winter. In my heart, it is firmly number one because it is so unique and rare. The cocoa coffee brown double pocket chain bag is a must-have for sisters 👭. It combines the calfskin, large bag, adjustable chain, and silver buckle—these major perfect elements. Similar styles have been released many times, but this suede brown is the one that hits me the most. The leather looks like cowhide texture but feels like thick matte suede. The chain can be worn as a crossbody bag. Lightweight, can fit a computer + iPad! Dimensions: 34x25x10cm

items.name_en: P 🌹 (Large) 2023 Autumn/Winter New Arrival 🍰 1BD328 is here. This System soft lambskin shoulder bag is embellished with a triangular pattern crafted with exquisite stitching, highlighting the brand's craftsmanship. The flap design features a chain handle that evokes jewelry associations / and is detachable. The front metal-engraved logo is outlined by the iconic triangular stitching, showcasing the brand's style. Can be carried by hand / shoulder / crossbody, highly functional 👍. If you like it, get yours now. Dimensions: 24 x 15 x 7.5cm 🎉🎉!
